name: JENNE.COM
message: [AI generated] Jenne, Inc. is a leading U.S. based value-added distributor and master agent of technology products and solutions. They focus on providing products, solutions, and services to their reseller partners in various industries like voice and data networking, physical security, video conferencing, and unified communications. Jenne.com strives to deliver top-tier personalized service, flexible logistics, and professional training to businesses. It was established in 1986.
